utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections. Now check if each is fully specified per the brief: - property: includes selected property with details and price (name, address, bedrooms, price) – covered. - financing: includes financing solution with terms (solution type, down payment, mortgage amount, interest rate, fees, insurance applicability) – covered. - legal_services: includes legal services with costs (lawyer fees, land transfer tax, title insurance, disbursements, total) – covered. - moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (type and cost) – covered. - setup_services: utility and setup services (initial setup cost and estimated monthly utilities) – covered. - total_budget: complete cost breakdown (line items and total) – covered. All 6 items are present and reasonably detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes specific selections that correspond to entries in the ground-truth ratings: property 'Historic Townhouse', financing 'Traditional Mortgage' (mortgage with 20% down aligns with Traditional Mortgage in purchase_financing), legal services 'Premium Legal Package', property survey 'Full Structural Survey', moving services 'Standard Moving', and utility setup 'Premium Utilities'. I mapped each of these named items to their exact ratings from the ground-truth list.
